security.csp: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https: wss: ws://localhost:* http://localhost:*; media-src 'self' https: http: blob:; form-action 'self'
